calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-10-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/E. Estacio, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Deborah Lew, Esq. for Plaintiff: State Bar of California.
Plaintiff's witness, Tracy McCormick, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Andrew E. Westell as follows:
Principal $45,050.00
Judgment signed in open court.
